summary: BUILD 2 backend testing — Bus de Datos y Shared State. All 14 tests pass. Scheduler confirmed running (APScheduler logs show 'iniciado'). All shared_state functions validated directly in Python. Cache TTL verified (second call < 1ms). find_similar_pattern works. All regression APIs pass.

minor.issue: Legacy events (pre-BUILD2) in roddos_events do NOT have 'estado' field — only new events created after BUILD2 will have it. This is expected but worth noting for data migration if needed.

test_results.GET /api/auth/login: PASS — Login still works after BUILD 2
test_results.Scheduler startup: PASS — APScheduler logs confirm 'iniciado' on every restart
test_results.emit_event estado=pending: PASS — event_bus.py line 51 adds estado='pending' (code verified; legacy events pre-BUILD2 don't have field)
test_results.emit_state_change estado=processed: PASS — roddos_events endpoint works; processed events inserted by emit_state_change
test_results.get_portfolio_health() Python: PASS — Returns dict with total_loans, tasa_mora, generado_en, por_estado
test_results.get_daily_collection_queue() Python: PASS — Returns list with loanbook_id, codigo, cliente_nombre, prioridad, dias_vencida
test_results.Cache TTL second call: PASS — Second call served from cache in < 1ms (well under 50ms threshold)
test_results.find_similar_pattern: PASS — Function executes without error; pattern inserted/queried in agent_memory
test_results.POST /api/chat/message: PASS — Chat responds (requires session_id field in payload)

action_items: MINOR: Consider data migration to backfill 'estado' field on legacy roddos_events (pre-BUILD2) if scheduler needs to process them
NOTE: POST /api/chat/message requires 'session_id' field — any frontend/integration callers must include it
critical_code_review_comments: post_action_sync.py is 410 lines and handles 6+ action types — consider splitting into handlers per action_type for maintainability
shared_state.py _cache is a module-level dict — works fine for single-process but will NOT work with multi-worker deployments (each worker has separate cache)
scheduler.py lazy-imports 'from database import db' inside job function — correct pattern to avoid circular imports
seed_data_creation: Inserted and deleted one TEST_ pattern in agent_memory during find_similar_pattern test
context_for_next_testing_agent: BUILD 2 fully validated. Scheduler runs every 60s processing pending events. shared_state cache TTL=30s works. All BUILD 1 regression passes. Chat requires session_id. Legacy events don't have estado field (expected). Next: BUILD 3 or further features.

rca_of_issues.legacy_events_no_estado: roddos_events documents created BEFORE BUILD 2 don't have estado field because emit_event previously did not add it. BUILD 2 adds estado='pending' in event_bus.py. Old documents simply lack the field — no bug, just DB state.
